data.name: deepseek-v4-flash
data.description: Fast, cheap, surprisingly capable. This is what every session starts on, and it's the right choice for the overwhelming majority of coding work — refactors, file edits, search, test scaffolding, lint fixes, anything where the bottleneck is "look at the code and apply the obvious change".

data.name: deepseek-v4-pro
data.description: The reasoning SKU. Slower, much more expensive, and noticeably smarter on hard problems. Worth it for: hairy debugging where the bug spans files, architectural design from a blank page, math/algorithms work, or anytime flash gets stuck in a loop and you can feel it guessing.
